name: Exclusion of Prizes and Awards Transferred to Charity

eligibility.description: Recipient must be selected without action to enter, not be required to render future services, and must designate the transfer to a 170(c) organization before receiving the benefit.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can exclude certain recognition awards (religious, scientific, artistic, etc.) from gross income if they designate the payor to transfer the prize directly to a qualified charity.
